texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information, visit abp.io.
texts.KLC:Connector:DuplicateNumber: Connector #{connectorNumber} already exists on this station.
texts.KLC:Connector:MaxPowerInvalid: Max power must be greater than 0.
texts.KLC:Tariff:InvalidTaxRate: Tax rate must be between 0 and 100.
texts.KLC:Tariff:InvalidEffectivePeriod: Effective end date must be after start date.
texts.KLC:Payment:SessionNotOwned: You do not have access to this session.
texts.KLC:Payment:NotOwned: You do not have access to this payment.
texts.KLC:Payment:MethodNotOwned: You do not have access to this payment method.
texts.KLC:Payment:InvalidRefund: Only completed payments can be refunded.
texts.KLC:Vehicle:NotOwned: You do not have access to this vehicle.
texts.KLC:Vehicle:HasActiveSession: Cannot delete a vehicle with an active charging session.
texts.KLC:Session:AlreadyActive: You already have an active charging session.
texts.KLC:Session:NoDefaultVehicle: No default vehicle found. Please add a vehicle first.
texts.KLC:Session:NotOwned: You do not have access to this session.
texts.KLC:Session:InvalidStatus: Session is not in the required status for this operation.
texts.KLC:Profile:EmailAlreadyUsed: This email address is already in use.
texts.KLC:Profile:PhoneAlreadyUsed: This phone number is already in use.
texts.KLC:Profile:HasActiveSession: Cannot deactivate account while a charging session is active.
texts.KLC:StationGroup:StationAlreadyAssigned: Station '{stationName}' is already assigned to another group.
texts.KLC:StationGroup:StationNotInGroup: Station is not in this group.
texts.KLC:CannotDeleteCurrentUser: You cannot delete your own account.
texts.KLC:CannotLockCurrentUser: You cannot lock your own account.
texts.KLC:CannotDeleteRoleWithUsers: Cannot delete role with {UserCount} assigned users.
texts.KLC:EInvoiceAlreadyExists: An e-invoice already exists for this invoice.
texts.KLC:EInvoiceAlreadyCancelled: This e-invoice has already been cancelled.
texts.KLC:Notification:NotOwned: You do not have access to this notification.
texts.KLC:Auth:PhoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number is already registered.
texts.KLC:Feedback:NotOwned: You do not have access to this feedback.
texts.KLC:Station:HasActiveSessions: Cannot decommission station with active charging sessions.
texts.KLC:Wallet:MonthlyTopUpLimitExceeded: Monthly top-up limit exceeded per SBV regulations.
texts.KLC:EntityNotFound: The requested resource was not found.
